file.content:
{
  "name": "personalwebsite",
  "version": "0.1.0",
  "private": true,
  "packageManager": "npm@10.9.2",
  "engines": {
    "node": ">=20"
  },
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "next dev",
    "build": "next build",
    "postbuild": "next-sitemap --config next-sitemap.config.js",
    "start": "next start",
    "lint": "next lint",
    "typecheck": "tsc --noEmit",
    "test": "vitest run",
    "test:e2e": "playwright test"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "@mdx-js/loader": "^3.1.1",
    "@mdx-js/react": "^3.1.1",
    "@next/mdx": "^16.2.4",
    "@radix-ui/react-dialog": "^1.1.15",
    "@radix-ui/react-visually-hidden": "^1.2.4",
    "@types/mdx": "^2.0.13",
    "@vercel/analytics": "^2.0.1",
    "framer-motion": "^12.38.0",
    "fuse.js": "^7.3.0",
    "next": "^15.1.0",
    "next-sitemap": "^4.2.3",
    "react": "^19.0.0",
    "react-dom": "^19.0.0",
    "zod": "^4.3.6",
    "zustand": "^5.0.12"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@axe-core/react": "^4.11.2",
    "@playwright/test": "^1.59.1",
    "@testing-library/react": "^16.3.2",
    "@types/node": "^22.0.0",
    "@types/react": "^19.0.0",
    "@types/react-dom": "^19.0.0",
    "axe-core": "^4.11.3",
    "eslint": "^9.0.0",
    "eslint-config-next": "^15.1.0",
    "prettier": "^3.8.3",
    "stylelint": "^17.8.0",
    "stylelint-config-standard": "^40.0.0",
    "typescript": "^5.0.0",
    "vitest": "^4.1.4"
  }
}

content.text:
Build succeeded. All four verification checks pass.

## Summary

- `src/styles/tokens.css` — replaced typography section with two-face stacks (`--t-mono`, `--t-serif`), 7-step size/line-height scale (sm → 3xl), and tracking tokens (tight/normal/wide). Removed the old `--font-sans`/`--font-mono`/`--font-serif` system-fallback declarations and the `--t-xxs`/`--t-xs` steps not in the new scale.
- `src/styles/typography.css` (new) — utility classes: `.t-headline`, `.t-h1`, `.t-h2`, `.t-h3`, `.t-prose`, `.t-mono-body`, `.t-meta`, `.t-code` (uses `--bg-mute` from forthcoming P02).
- `src/app/layout.tsx` — loads JetBrains Mono and Source Serif 4 via `next/font/google` with `display: 'swap'`, assigns CSS variables (`--font-mono`, `--font-serif`) on `<html>` via className. Imports `typography.css`.

Verification:
- `grep 'font-mono\|font-serif' src/app/layout.tsx` → matches at lines 13, 19. ✅
- `grep -nE '^\s*--t-(mono|serif|sm-size|base-size|md-size|lg-size|xl-size|2xl-size|3xl-size):' src/styles/tokens.css` → 9 expected hits. ✅
- `test -f src/styles/typography.css` → present. ✅
- `npm run build` → compiled successfully, 15 static pages generated, sitemap emitted. ✅

Caveats:
- Some legacy code still references `var(--font-sans)` (e.g. `reset.css`, `globals.css .synopsis`, `ProjectsTable.tsx`, `_legacy_v1/...`, and `styleguide/page.tsx`). The prompt restricts file touches to the three above and notes styleguide rendering is left to P06, so those callers will fall back to browser default until migrated by later prompts.
- `--bg-mute` referenced in `.t-code` will be defined by P02; until then the background falls back to transparent.

IMPL_RESULT: PASS

result:
Build succeeded. All four verification checks pass.

## Summary

- `src/styles/tokens.css` — replaced typography section with two-face stacks (`--t-mono`, `--t-serif`), 7-step size/line-height scale (sm → 3xl), and tracking tokens (tight/normal/wide). Removed the old `--font-sans`/`--font-mono`/`--font-serif` system-fallback declarations and the `--t-xxs`/`--t-xs` steps not in the new scale.
- `src/styles/typography.css` (new) — utility classes: `.t-headline`, `.t-h1`, `.t-h2`, `.t-h3`, `.t-prose`, `.t-mono-body`, `.t-meta`, `.t-code` (uses `--bg-mute` from forthcoming P02).
- `src/app/layout.tsx` — loads JetBrains Mono and Source Serif 4 via `next/font/google` with `display: 'swap'`, assigns CSS variables (`--font-mono`, `--font-serif`) on `<html>` via className. Imports `typography.css`.

Verification:
- `grep 'font-mono\|font-serif' src/app/layout.tsx` → matches at lines 13, 19. ✅
- `grep -nE '^\s*--t-(mono|serif|sm-size|base-size|md-size|lg-size|xl-size|2xl-size|3xl-size):' src/styles/tokens.css` → 9 expected hits. ✅
- `test -f src/styles/typography.css` → present. ✅
- `npm run build` → compiled successfully, 15 static pages generated, sitemap emitted. ✅

Caveats:
- Some legacy code still references `var(--font-sans)` (e.g. `reset.css`, `globals.css .synopsis`, `ProjectsTable.tsx`, `_legacy_v1/...`, and `styleguide/page.tsx`). The prompt restricts file touches to the three above and notes styleguide rendering is left to P06, so those callers will fall back to browser default until migrated by later prompts.
- `--bg-mute` referenced in `.t-code` will be defined by P02; until then the background falls back to transparent.

IMPL_RESULT: PASS
